events.target:
git add docs/engineering-log.md && git commit -m "docs(log): Phase 4 design decisions (DR-11 revised + DR-12..15)

Per Jason's choice to do Phase 4 properly (not skip), captured 5
design DRs before any code is written:

DR-11 revised — original 'skip Phase 4' recommendation reversed.
  Original optimized for calendar time (~3 weeks). Jason's explicit
  optimization target is engineering growth + production safety, which
  reverses the calculation. Both the original and revised analyses
  are kept in the DR for the meta-lesson: the right answer changes
  with the objective function.

DR-12 — Storage representation: single JSON blob per game keyed by
  ki_clash:game:{game_id}, serialized via Pydantic model_dump_json.
  Considered hash fields, multi-key, RedisJSON; chose blob for atomic
  full-state updates and trivial schema evolution.

DR-13 — Pub/sub topology: per-player channel
  (ki_clash:player:{player_id}). Considered per-game, global,
  WebSocket-direct; chose per-player for direct routing with no
  filtering overhead.

DR-14 — Concurrency control: Redis WATCH/MULTI/EXEC optimistic with
  3-retry budget. Considered locks, Lua, queues; chose optimistic
  because contention is < 0.1% at our scale.

DR-15 — Session statefulness: workers are stateless, Redis is truth.
  PvPGameSession becomes a façade of methods that load/mutate/save.
  Eliminates cache coherence problems, makes worker crashes
  recoverable, simplifies horizontal scaling.

Each DR follows the 6-part structure (Decision/Options/Trade-offs/
Reasoning/Meta-pattern/Interview-framing) so Jason can use them as
study material.

Also: Part 1 chronological log gains a Phase 4 'starts: design-first'
entry that links to the new DRs and lists the 6 implementation
sub-phases (4.1 through 4.6).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>" 2>&1 | tail -3

ps aux | grep "python server.py" | grep -v grep
echo "---"
lsof -i :8765 2>&1 | head -5
echo "---"
cat /tmp/viz-core.log | tail -50

events.text: 채팅로그에 들어가면 이게 너네 본진으로 어떻게든 가냐?

events.target:
echo "=== /sessions/event POST ==="
curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:8765/sessions/event \
  -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  -d '{"kind":"prompt","text":"viz-core 시작","source":"user"}'
echo ""

echo ""
echo "=== /sessions/today ==="
curl -s http://127.0.0.1:8765/sessions/today | python3 -m json.tool

echo ""
echo "=== /sessions 목록 ==="
curl -s http://127.0.0.1:8765/sessions

echo "=== /sessions/2026-05-26/archive ==="
curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:8765/sessions/2026-05-26/archive | python3 -m json.tool

echo ""
echo "=== library 에 session 자산 박힘 확인 ==="
curl -s "http://127.0.0.1:8765/library?lang=en" | python3 -c "
import json, sys
d = json.load(sys.stdin)
print('total:', d['count'])
for i in d['items']:
    print(f\"  {i['viz_kind']}/{i['slug']:<25} -> {i['title']}\")
"

echo ""
echo "=== ls library/session/ ==="
ls -la library/session/ 2>&1 | head -5

echo ""
echo "=== Dockerfile + fly.toml 박힘 확인 ==="
ls -la Dockerfile fly.toml DEPLOY.md 2>&1 | head -5
